name: Creme De Menthe Bars
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons dry instant vanilla pudding mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the 1/2 cup butter and cocoa powder in a saucepan over low heat. Let cool.
2. Add the 1/2 cup powdered sugar, beaten egg, vanilla extract, crushed graham cracker crumbs, nuts, and coconut to the melted mixture. Stir until combined.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased 9 x 13 inch pan and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
4. Melt the 1 1/2 cups butter in a saucepan over low heat. Add creme de menthe, pudding mix, and 2 cups powdered sugar to the melted butter. Stir until smooth and spread evenly over the crust layer.
5. Refrigerate for 30 minutes until set.
6. Melt the 1/4 cup butter and chocolate chips in a microwave or saucepan. Spread the mixture on top of the layered bars.
7. Refrigerate for an additional 30 minutes until firm.
8. Cut into small bars using a sharp knife. Store in an airtight container at room temperature.
